ddls:
CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the restaurant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the restaurant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the restaurant */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the restaurant */,
  "cuisine_type" TEXT /* Type of cuisine offered by the restaurant */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Customer rating of the restaurant */,
  "delivery_range" TEXT /* Delivery range of the restaurant */,
  "minimum_order_amount" TEXT /* Minimum order amount for delivery */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the restaurant's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_cuisine_type FOREIGN KEY ("cuisine_type") REFERENCES cuisine_types ("name")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant that the order belongs to */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., Prepaid Order) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the order */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Placed, Preparing, Out for Delivery, Delivered) */,
  "delivery_address" TEXT /* Delivery address for the order */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the delivery driver */,
  "order_source" TEXT /* Source of the order (e.g., Web, Mobile App, Phone) */,
  "promo_code" TEXT /* Promo code used for the order */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Discount amount applied to the order */,
  "subtotal" TEXT /* Subtotal cost of the order */,
  "service_charge" TEXT /* Service charge for the order */,
  "delivery_fee" TEXT /* Delivery fee for the order */,
  "tax" TEXT /* Tax on the order */,
  "tip" TEXT /* Tip for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the customer last logged in */,
  "total_orders" INTEGER /* Total number of orders placed by the customer */,
  "total_spent" TEXT /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points earned by the customer */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the customer's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the item belongs to */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the item */,
  "item_category" TEXT /* Category of the item (e.g., Appetizer, Main Course, Dessert) */,
  "item_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the item's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, Online Payment) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Success, Failed, Pending) */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference information for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the invoice belongs to */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "subtotal" TEXT /* Subtotal of the invoice */,
  "tax" TEXT /* Tax on the invoice */,
  "tip" TEXT /* Tip on the invoice */,
  "total" TEXT /* Total amount of the invoice */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the invoice */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "invoice_status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., Paid, Unpaid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the driver */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the driver */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the driver */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Customer rating of the driver */,
  "total_deliveries" INTEGER /* Total number of deliveries made by the driver */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the driver's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the feedback belongs to */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who provided the feedback */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the customer */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cuisine_types" (
  "cuisine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cuisine type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cuisine type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cuisine type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cuisine_id")
)
